creator: stephen.wall@redcom.com
text:
When python was flavorized, MOVED gained the line

devel/boost-python3-libs|devel/boost-python-libs@py36|2018-02-15|Flavorize

to update boost-python3-libs to the flavored version.  However, there is no equivalent for the py27 version of boost-python-libs.  It seems like

devel/boost-python-libs|devel/boost-python-libs@py27|2018-02-15|Flavorize

should have been added at the same time.
